mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT EXPO_NUMBER, EXPO_NAME, TO_CHAR(START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, LOCATION, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE FROM TBL_EXPO ORDER BY EXPO_NUMBER DESC ) A ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_EXPO ( EXPO_NUMBER, ADMIN_NUMBER, EXPO_NAME, START_DATE, END_DATE, LOCATION, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_EXPO_NUMBER.NEXTVAL, #{adminNumber}, #{expoName}, TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{location}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT EXPO_NUMBER, ADMIN_NUMBER, EXPO_NAME, TO_CHAR(START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, LOCATION, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE FROM TBL_EXPO WHERE EXPO_NUMBER = #{expoNumber}

SELECT E.EXPO_NUMBER, E.EXPO_NAME, E.LOCATION, C.COMPANY_NUMBER, C.COMPANY_NAME, C.COMPANY_ADDRESS FROM TBL_EXPO E JOIN TBL_EXPO_COMPANY EC ON E.EXPO_NUMBER = EC.EXPO_NUMBER JOIN TBL_COMPANY C ON EC.COMPANY_NUMBER = C.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE E.EXPO_NUMBER = #{expoNumber} ORDER BY C.COMPANY_NAME

SELECT COMPANY_NUMBER, COMPANY_BRN, COMPANY_NAME, COMPANY_ADDRESS, COMPANY_STATE FROM TBL_COMPANY WHERE COMPANY_STATE = '승인' AND COMPANY_NUMBER NOT IN ( SELECT COMPANY_NUMBER FROM TBL_EXPO_COMPANY WHERE EXPO_NUMBER = #{expoNumber} ) ORDER BY COMPANY_NAME
SELECT EXPO_NUMBER, EXPO_NAME, START_DATE, END_DATE FROM TBL_EXPO ORDER BY START_DATE
